refreshCadence: Daily via GitHub Actions schedule and workflow dispatch
scope: Legal free movie and TV streaming sites only

method.rating: 0-100 editorial utility score combining catalog breadth, TV depth, live channel usefulness, recent-source freshness, and access friction.
method.latest: Daily generator refreshes timestamp and optional source reachability; source list is curated from official pages, JustWatch provider discovery, and current editorial roundups.

services.name: Tubi
services.bestFor: Movies, big TV library, recent free arrivals
services.country: US, Canada, Australia, Mexico, UK, Latin America availability varies
latestSignals: Official site exposes Recently Added, Most Popular, Movies, TV Shows, and Live TV sections.
Current homepage includes 2025-2026 titles and active FOX sports/event hubs.
services.watchNotes: Strong first stop for free on-demand movies and recognizable TV. Ads are the tradeoff.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: The Roku Channel
services.signup: Optional on web; device account often used
services.bestFor: FAST channels, broad household viewing, originals
services.country: US, Canada, Mexico, UK availability varies
latestSignals: Roku recently added 22 free live channels according to Tom's Guide.
Public references show 500+ free channels and a large free movie/show catalog.
services.watchNotes: A top cable-like free option, especially if the viewer already uses Roku hardware.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Pluto TV
services.bestFor: Live TV grid, channel surfing, Paramount-backed library
services.country: Americas and Europe, catalog varies by country
latestSignals: Official site positions Pluto as free movies, TV shows, and live TV.
Public references show hundreds of FAST channels and a cable-style grid model.
services.watchNotes: Best when the viewer wants to turn something on now instead of searching a catalog.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Plex
services.bestFor: Free movies plus personal media and discovery tools
latestSignals: Official watch site lists free movies, TV shows, and live TV.
Editorial roundups continue to rank Plex as a major free streaming option.
services.watchNotes: Good for people who also want watchlists and personal-library tooling.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Sling Freestream
services.bestFor: Large live channel bundle and free on-demand backup
latestSignals: Official Sling page markets Freestream as free live TV, shows, movies, and news.
Recent buying guides cite hundreds of free live channels and tens of thousands of on-demand titles.
services.watchNotes: A strong live-TV complement to Tubi or Plex.

sources.label: TechRadar Sling trial and Freestream guide

services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: YouTube Free
latestSignals: Major free-streaming roundups include YouTube as a free movies and series source.
JustWatch tracks YouTube Free as a separate free provider.
services.watchNotes: Huge reach, but the free movie catalog can be noisier than dedicated FAST apps.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Fandango at Home Free
services.bestFor: Free-with-ads movies next to rentals and purchases
latestSignals: Editorial roundups still include Fandango at Home/Vudu for free ad-supported movies.
JustWatch tracks Fandango as a provider in the US catalog.
services.watchNotes: Useful when a viewer already uses Fandango/Vudu for rentals.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Kanopy
latestSignals: TechRadar ranks Kanopy as a distinct free option for educational and classic cinema.
Access depends on a participating library or university, so it is not universal.
services.watchNotes: Highest signal-to-noise for film lovers if the user's library supports it.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Xumo Play
services.bestFor: Live FAST channels and lean-back viewing
latestSignals: FAST category references list Xumo as a major ad-supported platform.
JustWatch tracks Xumo Play as a US provider.
services.watchNotes: Good secondary live-TV option behind Pluto/Roku/Sling.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

services.name: Samsung TV Plus
latestSignals: FAST references list Samsung TV Plus as a major device-owned platform.
Recent free-movie roundups cite Samsung TV Plus for rotating free titles.
services.watchNotes: Best if the viewer already has a Samsung TV or Galaxy device.
services.price: Free with ads or institution access

excluded.name: Amazon Freevee
excluded.reason: Retired as a standalone service; free content moved into Prime Video's free-with-ads area.

excluded.name: Peacock free tier
excluded.reason: No longer broadly available to new customers as a free standalone tier.

excluded.name: Unlicensed mirror sites
excluded.reason: Excluded intentionally. This dashboard only lists legitimate ad-supported, library, or official free sources.
